root_cause.headline: Invoice-routing config pushed three weeks ago flags EUR 5K-plus invoices for an extra approval stop in EMEA only
root_cause.detail: 68% of EMEA tier-2 invoices over EUR 5,000 carry routing_status = 'pending_approval' versus 12% in NA for the same period. The bottleneck is the routing rule — a configuration change, not an AP staffing issue. Rolling back the config restores DPO parity without a hiring decision. The rule was introduced in the EMEA AP config push of 2026-05-02 and applies only to company codes in the EMEA cluster.
root_cause.affected_cohort: EMEA tier-2 suppliers · invoices over EUR 5,000 · Q1 2026

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analytics backlog. Audit Committee meets without the answer.
narrative: CFO files the request. It enters the analytics backlog at priority A.
Data engineer scopes the work Monday morning — four days after the committee.
Engineer writes DPO SQL from scratch, joining four gold and silver models by hand.
Tests, YAML, and contract get bolted on at PR time. Sometimes.
Finance team cannot isolate root cause before the audit committee meeting.
Working-capital exposure of $18M remains unresolved through the weekend.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 90 seconds.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a Q1 2026 EMEA tier-2 slice. Validates the proposed grain.
Worker authors fct_dpo_by_supplier_tier_bu_quarter.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 8 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Iceberg. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
CFO presents root-cause finding to Audit Committee 22 hours ahead of schedule.

hero.label: Root cause identified 22 hours before the Audit Committee meets
hero.note: From CFO question to materialized Iceberg gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The EMEA finance team now knows the invoice-routing config push is the bottleneck. The fix is a config rollback, not a hiring decision. $18M working-capital impact and supplier-risk exposure resolved before the weekend.
